milestones.title: Further reduce Haiku 4.5 synthesis time in async Lambda (currently 23.4s avg)
milestones.quickPrompt: Investigate the Haiku 4.5 async Lambda timing. Currently averaging 23.4s (down from 27.4s with compact prompt). The reasoning Lambda is at sevaro-reasoning. Check if there are additional prompt optimizations, parallelization opportunities, or caching strategies that could reduce this further. Current compact prompt is active via SYNTHESIS_PROMPT_COMPACT=1.

milestones.title: SSO Phase 4: Passkeys/WebAuthn
milestones.quickPrompt: Context for this session: Cognito pool us-east-2_9y6XyJnXC. Microsoft Entra ID SSO shipped in v2.6.8/v2.6.9 (PR #818/#820 area). Passkeys/WebAuthn are the next SSO phase (user-requested). Recent Scribe work: v2.6.20-v2.6.21 shipped companion auto-reconnect (PR #855), combined extension build (PR #857), dual-channel SSR env fix. Note-section editing is flag-gated OFF in .env.production (VITE_NOTE_SECTION_EDIT_ENABLED). Grounded feedback triage Lambda re-landed (PR #874). Branch protection on main enabled (Jun 12). Case discussion generate mode flag-gated (PR #880, Jun 14). Encounter DELETE data-loss fix shipped (PR #883, Jun 13) - server now refuses to delete encounters with audio/transcript/note. Patient-identity extractor added flag-gated (Jun 13). Clarify weave clobbering guard shipped (Jun 14).

milestones.title: Real-time voice streaming during encounters
milestones.quickPrompt: Implement real-time voice streaming during encounters using AWS Transcribe Medical (HIPAA-eligible). This is the next priority after triage async+polling shipped May 2. The triage route now uses 202+poll pattern to avoid the ~28s Amplify gateway timeout. Voice streaming should stream transcription in real-time during the encounter. Check src/app/api/triage/ for the async pattern reference.

milestones.title: Fill remaining 18 missing diagnosis plans
milestones.quickPrompt: 98 plans in DB, 148/166 diagnoses covered. 18 neurology diagnoses still lack treatment plans. Check src/lib/plans-db.ts and the neuro_plans database for the gap. Plans sync from blondarb/neuro-plans via npm run sync-plans.

milestones.title: Speaker diarization UI (P2)
milestones.quickPrompt: Speaker diarization is P2. The /consult historian uses WebRTC Realtime API. The /api/ai/visit-ai route handles diarized visit recording via Deepgram Nova-3. Diarization data exists in the transcript but the UI doesn't yet surface it. Build a speaker-labeled transcript view.

milestones.title: Clinical threshold tuning with real patient data
milestones.quickPrompt: SDNE clinical threshold tuning. The passive-findings repeatability harness is ready (PR #55, Jun 9) - per-task harness for calibration and threshold work. Recent: T00/T16 clinical accuracy fixes (PR #64, Jun 11) - T00 eye calibration now surfaces real gaze divergence instead of fake 0.95 quality score; T16 TUG trunk-yaw sway has physiologic sanity floor. Upload session hardening + phonetic name key (PRs #57-62, Jun 10-11). All acoustic thresholds are provisional - calibrated on synthetic/literature values. Phase 5 acoustic calibration is next. Check docs/DEVELOPMENT_STATUS.md and Scripts/Utilities/Thresholds.cs.

milestones.title: Watch IMU integration for motor tasks
milestones.quickPrompt: Integrate Apple Watch IMU data for motor tasks T09, T10, T11, T15, T16. The Watch IMU provides accelerometer and gyroscope data that can improve motor assessment accuracy. Check the existing sensor infrastructure in Scripts/Sensors/ and the task implementations for T09/T10/T11/T15/T16.

milestones.title: Deploy SDNE dashboard to AWS Amplify
milestones.quickPrompt: Deploy the SDNE results dashboard to AWS Amplify for team access. The dashboard is a React + TypeScript + Material UI app. It needs to connect to the AWS Lambda backend and DynamoDB tables (market-day-sessions, market-day-metrics, market-day-patients). Set up Amplify hosting and configure the environment variables for the Lambda endpoints.

milestones.title: Steel man test remediations (logging, thread safety, CRC32C, dead code)
milestones.quickPrompt: VoiceTranscriber steel man remediation pass. Context as of Jun 10: shipped record-while-transcribing + background jobs (mic immediately available after stop), interactive Archive (open/edit/re-run AI cleanup/export past transcripts), on-device map-reduce summarization for 72-min+ transcripts (chunks→summaries→merge), 72-min UI freeze fix (CoreText lazy chunking), virtual-meeting stops-early fix (system-audio tap routing), silent mic abort fallback. Two-channel virtual meetings VERIFIED WORKING. On-device FluidAudio diarization (Phase 2b) shipped. Remaining steel-man items: logging hygiene, thread-safety audit, CRC32C integrity checks, dead code cleanup. Check qa/STEEL-MAN-*.md for the full remediation list.

milestones.title: App Store submission preparation
milestones.quickPrompt: Prepare VoiceTranscriber for App Store submission. Before submission: verify Apple FoundationModels stays strictly on-device vs Private Cloud Compute (scribe-readiness review); the Bedrock summary fallback needs a BAA-covered path or on-device-only mode; encrypt transcripts at rest. Also evaluate AWS Transcribe Medical vs Deepgram for production quality. Check docs/PRIVACY_POLICY.md and docs/TERMS_OF_SERVICE.md.

milestones.title: Submit iOS update (Supabase → v2 REST API migration)
milestones.quickPrompt: Migrate the v1 neuro-plans iOS app from Supabase PostgREST to the v2 REST API. The v2 API is live at the Amplify URL. Update SupabaseService.swift to point to the v2 base URL. Replace .from('table').select() with GET /api/domains?specialty=neurology. Replace .from('table').insert() with POST /api/analytics/verify-email and POST /api/feedback/plan-request. The Cognito pool is us-east-2_Owfb1zpgM. SSO migration from deprecated pool to us-east-2_9y6XyJnXC is non-blocking but needed for the Review Plans pill deep-link to neuroplans.app.

milestones.title: Session comparison (side-by-side diff)
milestones.quickPrompt: Add session comparison feature to XR Test Companion. Allow selecting two sessions and viewing a side-by-side diff of their timelines, transcripts, and metrics. The session data is in ~/XRTestSessions/ with subdirs: screenshots/, video/, logs/, metrics/. The SessionManager owns the timeline. The SessionExportService generates summary.md files.

milestones.title: Migrate v1 iOS app from Supabase to v2 API
milestones.quickPrompt: Migrate the cardio-plans v1 iOS app from Supabase PostgREST to the cardio-plans-v2 REST API. Update SupabaseService.swift: replace .from('whitelisted_domains').select() with GET /api/domains?specialty=cardiology; replace inserts with POST /api/analytics/verify-email and POST /api/feedback/plan-request. The v2 API is live at cardio.neuroplans.app.

milestones.title: Expand neurocritical care content library
milestones.quickPrompt: Expand the neurocritical care content library. 150 plans are currently live across 14 categories. Add new plans, scoring scales, and clinical tools. The pipeline for generating plans is in sevaro-plan-pipeline repo. The plans are stored in the neurocrit_care RDS database.

milestones.title: Expand PM&R content library
milestones.quickPrompt: Expand the PM&R rehabilitation content library. 166 plans are currently live. Add new plans and clinical tools for physical medicine and rehabilitation. The pipeline for generating plans is in sevaro-plan-pipeline repo.

milestones.quickPrompt: Add pulmonary/critical care calculators to the tools library: ventilator settings calculator, ABG interpretation tool, severity scores (APACHE II, SOFA, CURB-65). The tools are stored in the pulm_crit_care RDS database. Check the existing tools API route.

milestones.title: Expand spine surgery content library
milestones.quickPrompt: Expand the spine surgery content library. 148 plans are currently live. Add new plans and clinical tools for spine surgery. The pipeline for generating plans is in sevaro-plan-pipeline repo.

milestones.title: Request SES production access
milestones.quickPrompt: Request AWS SES production access to remove sandbox restrictions. Currently SES can only send to verified email addresses. Submit a production access request via AWS console. The SES sending domain is neuroplans.app, from address feedback@neuroplans.app.

milestones.title: Tier 3 alarm promotion as usage patterns emerge
milestones.quickPrompt: Review Tier 3 Lambda functions in the SERVICE_MAP and promote high-value ones to Tier 2 alarms based on actual usage patterns. Current monitoring: 55 deployed Lambdas, 54 CloudWatch metric filters, 43 alarms (Tier 1+2 only). Tier 3 = metric filter only. Check the sevaro-error-responder Lambda and template.yaml.

milestones.title: Dashboard consolidation across monitored services
milestones.quickPrompt: Consolidate CloudWatch dashboards across all 55 monitored Sevaro Lambda services into a unified operations dashboard. Currently monitoring is spread across individual alarms. Build a unified CloudWatch dashboard that shows all Tier 1 and Tier 2 services at a glance.

milestones.title: Additional endpoints as needed
milestones.quickPrompt: The admin API has 7 endpoints for Cognito user management and Bedrock model access. Add endpoints as new admin needs arise. The SAM template is at template.yaml. Lambda functions are in the lambda/ directory. The MCP server wraps all endpoints as tools in mcp-server/.

milestones.title: Sonali AI voice coaching integration
milestones.quickPrompt: Continue Sonali AI coaching integration. The Sonali FBX model is loaded at 200x scale. The sonali_base.fbx is a static mesh only - no skeleton or SkinnedMeshRenderer, so gaze tracking and lip sync cannot be wired yet. The sonali_blendshapes.glb uses DefaultImporter in Unity - needs investigation for blend shape import. Voice is Amazon Polly Kajal Neural (us-east-1 only). The AWS API Gateway is at https://6ml4wgo1m4.execute-api.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/dev. Check docs/ASSET_PIPELINE.md for the 3D model pipeline.

milestones.quickPrompt: Migrate workout history storage from UserDefaults to Core Data for better persistence and querying. The current storage is in UserDefaults throughout the workout/ directory. Core Data was planned but not started. The app is RepGenius (bundle ID blondarb.workout).

milestones.quickPrompt: Refresh the GitHub Showcase portfolio at showcase.neuroplans.app. New projects to add: E/M Coding Engine (live at coding.neuroplans.app), Shadow Coder + three-way comparison (shipped Apr 8), On-Call Facility Guides (live at evidence.neuroplans.app). The showcase uses RDS/PostgreSQL for project metadata - update via the admin panel at /admin, not static files. The highlights column is text[] - pass JS arrays directly to pg.

milestones.title: Quarterly guideline review and plan updates
milestones.quickPrompt: Run quarterly guideline freshness check for cardio plans. Use python3 scripts/check_guideline_freshness.py --cache. Key actions: newer_available → update plan references immediately; aging (≥8yr) → check society website manually; review_recommended (≥5yr) → verify current practice. After updating: regenerate JSON → copy to iOS bundle → verify parity.

The app uses AWS Bedrock Haiku 4.5 (migrated from OpenAI) and OpenAI Realtime API for voice intake. Cognito pool us-east-2_9y6XyJnXC, client 3jpfn7spe4m5m8emb186i6mf0s. Default branch is claude/fitness-safety-framework-ZXgf3, not main.

milestones.title: Additional Scribe API endpoints
milestones.quickPrompt: Add additional Scribe API endpoints as Chrome extensions migrate to AWS Lambda. milestones.title: Expand pipeline to additional specialties
milestones.quickPrompt: Expand the Sevaro Plan Pipeline to generate plans for additional medical specialties beyond pulmonary/critical care. The pipeline is a Step Functions state machine with 8 steps: GeneratePlan → VerifyParallel (4 branches) → MergeResults → Choice → ImportPlan → EnrichDosing → VerifyImport → Notify. The tool generation system can produce scales.json and tools.json for any specialty. Check data/diagnoses.json for the current diagnosis list format.

milestones.title: Home comparison feature refinement
milestones.quickPrompt: Refine the home comparison feature in home-eval.html. The tool has side-by-side comparison view with Supabase data persistence. Supabase integration is legacy per workspace migration strategy - consider migrating to AWS RDS if reworking. The site is hosted on Vercel. Check home-eval.html for the current implementation.

milestones.title: Build iOS + Mac voice transcription app
milestones.quickPrompt: Voxscribe is a universal voice transcription app (iPhone + iPad + Mac) built on Apple native iOS 26 / macOS 26 APIs. No cloud services, no API keys. Uses SpeechAnalyzer → DictationTranscriber (on-device) and FoundationModels → LanguageModelSession (on-device 3B model) for AI cleanup. Three targets: Voxscribe (iOS), VoxscribeKeyboard (iOS extension), VoxscribeMac (macOS menu bar). Build with XcodeGen (project.yml is source of truth). Team ID: 92YUSSM83T. Check docs/plans/2025-07-17-voxscribe-design.md for the approved design.

milestones.title: Polish pass and potential App Store submission
milestones.quickPrompt: SnapText is a macOS menu bar text expansion and snippet manager built with SwiftUI and SwiftData. Features: global keyboard monitoring, quick search palette with glassmorphism UI, clipboard monitoring, rich text editor, JSON import/export. Build with Swift Package Manager (Package.swift) or build-app.sh for .app bundle. Polish the keyboard monitor, search palette, onboarding, and settings. Then evaluate App Store submission.

milestones.title: Active prototype development
milestones.quickPrompt: Synapse TeleEncounter is the active telehealth encounter prototype (supersedes patient-health-platform). Check the repo for current architecture and status. The patient-health-platform repo is legacy/reference only for the Bedrock-integration pattern and demo patient schemas.
